{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of the Steel Guardian
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro]] feeds [[madra]] to his armor from his [[Path of the Steel Guardian]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
